name: resident_backward_perf
title: Resident Backward
desc: FUSED RESIDENT backward of the splat render: backward_ondevice s whole 17-stage chain in ONE ring, data-driven by a compile-time STAGE TABLE (matmul / matmul+SFPU-reciprocal / FPU eltwise-mul HiFi4 / eltwise-sub LoFi), staged through L1. Leaf grads dLdpsi/dLdop/dLdcolor <1.2% vs exact golden on silicon. Build overrides ITERATIONS=32.

telemetry.note: elapsed cycles + event counts per zone; published to the L1 perf region at 0x169000. Decode pending — runner currently peeks the base word only.

note: bhtop resident canon; see RESIDENT_GRID.md. alpha/oneMa recip inputs need finite col-padding (else inf->nan propagates through the matmul contractions).
